welcome.title: Welcome to AiutoX ERP
welcome.subtitle: Set up your system by creating the first administrator user

required.title: Setup Required
required.message: No users exist in the system. Please create the first administrator user to get started.

form.title: Create Administrator User
form.description: This user will have full system access with owner permissions.

email.label: Email Address
email.description: This will be your login email
email.invalid: Please enter a valid email address

fullName.label: Full Name
fullName.description: Your full name as it will appear in the system

password.label: Password
password.description: Minimum 8 characters, must include uppercase, lowercase and number
password.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters long
password.uppercase: Password must include at least one uppercase letter
password.lowercase: Password must include at least one lowercase letter
password.digit: Password must include at least one number

success.title: Setup Successful!
success.message: Administrator user has been created. Redirecting to login...

error.title: Setup Error
error.message: An error occurred while creating the user. Please try again.

windowClosed.title: Setup Window Closed
windowClosed.message: The setup window has expired. Please contact the system administrator or use the CLI to create a user.

error.title: Connection Error
error.message: Could not connect to the server. Please check your connection and try again.

security.title: Security
security.message: This page will be automatically disabled after creating the first user.

window.title: Time Window
window.message: You have {{minutes}} minutes to complete the setup from the system's first startup.
